/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {



    static constexpr std::array<int32_t, 5> keys = {
        1, 4, 7, 10, 12
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const int32_t key) noexcept {
        if ((key < 1))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((key > 12))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (((key > 1) && (key < 4)))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (((key > 4) && (key < 7)))
        {
         return false;
        }


        for (size_t i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
            if (keys[i] == key)
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 5;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key = 1;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key = 12;
};
